mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, EMAIL, NAME, NICKNAME, PHONE, EMAIL_VERIFIED, ACCOUNT_LOCKED, LOGIN_FAIL_CNT, ROLE, CREATED_AT FROM USERS ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalUsers, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(CREATED_AT) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todaySignups, SUM(CASE WHEN EMAIL_VERIFIED = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS verifiedUsers, SUM(CASE WHEN ACCOUNT_LOCKED = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lockedUsers FROM USERS
SELECT I.TICKER, I.NAME, COUNT(W.ITEM_ID) AS cnt FROM USER_WATCHLIST W JOIN STOCK_ITEM I ON W.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID GROUP BY W.ITEM_ID, I.TICKER, I.NAME ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5
